tools.purpose: Validate manifest JSON coverage, exact source-chain keys with repository-path values, JSON/Markdown summary counts, path metadata, referenced paths, safety boundaries, and open-decision links.

Regression-test missing audit IDs, duplicate IDs, missing or unexpected source-chain keys, invalid source-chain paths, JSON/Markdown summary drift, path metadata drift, missing paths, unsafe safety boundaries, and missing decision links.
Compare two audit manifests for regressions and improvements using leading status buckets, with optional JSON report output.
Regression-test leading status bucket, summary, decision, safety-boundary comparison behavior, and JSON report output.
Run the complete manifest/playbook verification bundle.
Validate full reusable audit rollup coverage, Markdown/JSON audit ID and summary coverage, source paths, repair queue, and safety booleans.
Regression-test full reusable audit rollup validation behavior, including Markdown/JSON audit ID and summary drift.
Validate rerun playbook baseline repository paths, coverage, required commands, required self-check closure checks, sections, required cleanup checks, and safety boundaries.
Regression-test rerun playbook validation behavior, including missing or invalid baseline paths, required self-check closure checks, and required cleanup checks.

Validate full reusable audit handoff source paths, rollup summary parity, residual risks, forbidden boundaries, required validation checks including its self-check, required cleanup validation checks, and safety booleans.
Regression-test full reusable audit handoff validation behavior, including rollup summary drift, missing self-check validation, and missing cleanup validation.
Validate remediation roadmap phases, work packages, blockers, required self-check closure checks, required cleanup checks, and safety boundaries.
Regression-test remediation plan validation behavior, including missing self-check closure commands and required cleanup checks.
Validate audit tooling index Markdown/JSON tool coverage, command/script coverage, package script existence, required self-check closure commands, required cleanup checks, and safety boundaries.
Regression-test tooling index validation behavior, including Markdown/JSON drift, missing package scripts, required self-check closure commands, and required cleanup checks.
Run representative DB-backed AUD-07 packs sequentially with reset/isolation.
Verify endpoint-level API documentation parity.
Check protected production input env-name readiness without printing or storing secret values.
Regression-test protected input readiness counting and secret-value redaction.
Validate the no-secret V1 operator unblock packet before protected operator execution.
Regression-test the operator unblock packet validator for required protected-input families, proof steps, evidence paths, safety boundaries, and acceptance rules.
